holdings.infoBox: ILCB is an equity ETF with a total of 539 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.39%, Apple at 6.69%, Microsoft at 4.34%, Amazon.com at 3.59%, and Alphabet at 3.27%.

overview.description: The iShares Morningstar U.S. Equity ETF (ILCB) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Morningstar US Large-Mid Cap Market index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index consists of both growth and value stocks, selected from the top 90% of the US market-cap spectrum. ILCB was launched on Jun 28, 2004 and is issued by BlackRock.
